kind: direct LDG reference (Li-Shu-Yang) for KS Example 5.2
paper: X.H. Li, C.-W. Shu, Y. Yang, LDG method for the Keller-Segel chemotaxis model, J. Sci. Comput.
system: u_t-div(grad u-u grad v)=0, v_t=Lap v+u-v, chi=1, Neumann on [-0.5,0.5]^2
scheme: P1 modal LDG; alternating fluxes (2.5-2.7); LF chemotaxis (2.8); Zhang-Shu P1 positivity limiter (sec4); SSP-RK3; adaptive dt
note: tb(N) via uniform-mesh LDG does NOT converge to 1.21e-4 at feasible resolution; the paper defers adaptive-mesh tb(N) for KS to future work. LDG reproduces Example 5.2 concentration (S_L2 grows with N).
